core_mechanism: iterative extraction of a dominant low-rank subspace by subspace (block power) iteration — repeatedly applying a large operator to a block of vectors and re-orthonormalizing via QR to converge onto its leading invariant subspace, producing a low-rank projector that reproduces a truncated singular-value decomposition while requiring only a decomposition of a much smaller matrix
brief_reason: The abstract's method replaces each large-matrix truncated SVD with a QR-based projector construction whose remaining SVD acts on a much smaller matrix, which is exactly the block-power/subspace-iteration route to a dominant low-rank subspace.
